roles.content: Ordinary language philosophy: A comprehensive examination of ordinary language philosophy within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on ordinary language philosophy: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to ordinary language philosophy.
roles.source: Journal of the History of Philosophy

roles.content: Recent developments in ordinary language philosophy: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of ordinary language philosophy in contemporary philosophy.
roles.source: British Journal for the History of Philosophy
